scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/desktop && npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build:java
scripts.pack:mac: npm run build && npm run pack:mac -w apps/desktop
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run dist:mac -w apps/desktop
scripts.test: npm run test -w apps/desktop && npm run test -w packages/shared && mvn -Dmaven.repo.local=.m2/repository -f apps/backend-java/pom.xml test
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/desktop && npm run typecheck -w packages/shared
